examples: In Aisle 34 is precut plastic flooring, the glue already in place.
Precut produce and bagged salads are time-savers.
Spend lavishly on precut vegetables at the supermarket.
Precut and packaged salads are a hit in the U.S. In Japan, Dole was among the first to test-market them.
Bagged produce is often precut, releasing water and nutrients that feed bacteria.
